testcase.name: adminRLSMiddleware > calls $transaction on ctx.prisma
adminRLSMiddleware > calls $executeRawUnsafe with set_config admin SQL inside transaction
adminRLSMiddleware > set_config SQL has true as 3rd argument (is_local=true / transaction-scoped)
adminRLSMiddleware > injects ctx.adminPrisma = transaction client
adminRLSMiddleware > sets ctx.crossAccountAccessed = true
adminRLSMiddleware > original ctx properties are preserved in the new ctx passed to next()
adminRLSMiddleware > propagates error from next() (transaction would auto-rollback)
adminRLSMiddleware > $executeRawUnsafe is called before next()
approvalGateCheckMiddleware > passes through when meta.requiresApproval is undefined
approvalGateCheckMiddleware > passes through when meta.requiresApproval is false
approvalGateCheckMiddleware > throws NOT_IMPLEMENTED when meta.requiresApproval is true
approvalGateCheckMiddleware > error message contains PRD-13 真闭环
approvalGateCheckMiddleware > error cause contains actionType + riskLevel
ipWhitelistMiddleware > passes through when ADMIN_IP_WHITELIST_ENABLED is not set
ipWhitelistMiddleware > passes when ENABLED=true and IP matches CIDR
ipWhitelistMiddleware > throws FORBIDDEN when ENABLED=true and IP does not match
ipWhitelistMiddleware > passes when IP matches one of multiple CIDRs
ipWhitelistMiddleware > skips invalid CIDR entries and still throws when no valid CIDR matches
ipWhitelistMiddleware > throws FORBIDDEN when ENABLED=true but CIDRS list is empty
mfaCheckMiddleware > passes through when ADMIN_MFA_REQUIRED is not set
mfaCheckMiddleware > passes through when ENABLED=true but role is admin (not super_admin)
mfaCheckMiddleware > passes through when ENABLED=true but role is readonly_admin
mfaCheckMiddleware > passes when ENABLED=true + super_admin + mfaVerifiedAt is fresh (< 30d)
mfaCheckMiddleware > throws PRECONDITION_FAILED when ENABLED=true + super_admin + mfaVerifiedAt is stale (> 30d)
mfaCheckMiddleware > throws PRECONDITION_FAILED when ENABLED=true + super_admin + mfaVerifiedAt is null
adminProcedure 6-gate order hard constraint > contains all 7 middleware in the correct gate order
roleCheckMiddleware > passes through when no requiredRole in meta
roleCheckMiddleware > super_admin (3) passes requiredRole=super_admin
roleCheckMiddleware > super_admin (3) passes requiredRole=admin
roleCheckMiddleware > admin (2) fails requiredRole=super_admin → FORBIDDEN
roleCheckMiddleware > readonly_admin (1) fails requiredRole=admin → FORBIDDEN
roleCheckMiddleware > ADMIN_ROLE_HIERARCHY has correct ordering
